title: settings
description: Configure the brain from the browser. This seed is shipped as reviewed kernel data so it can install before any brain exists.
notes: secret handling: API keys are written to SELF_HOME/.brain-key, never events.jsonl

commands.name: configure-brain
commands.description: Configure the brain process used by think/grow/compile; secrets are stored outside the event log.

projectors.name: settings
projectors.description: Configure this instance's brain and inspect the saved non-secret settings.
